reviews.comment:
El sábado pasado estuve aquí.
Para mi sorpresa el playero me dijo que no funcionaban los pagos de MP ni YPF y que era en todos los Acá.

Dentro del FULL pague todo con la App YPF...

Al irme me fije lo que me cobraron y me cobraron 5000$ por 26 LT de Nafta super.

Elijo creer que subió mucho la Super...

(Translated by Google)
I was here last Saturday.

To my surprise, the attendant told me that Mercado Pago and YPF payments weren't working, and that it was the same at all Acá stations.

Inside the full-service station, I paid for everything with the YPF app...

When I left, I checked the bill and it was $5,000 for 26 liters of premium gasoline.

I choose to believe that the price of premium gasoline has gone up a lot...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCZ09PWmdnRRAB
